title: Original Music Songpack (For Reactive Music)
description: The Original Minecraft Music, as a songpack for the Reactive Music mod.
body:
An implementation of the original Minecraft music for Reactive Music by CircuitLord.
[Get Reactive Music by CircuitLord here (this resourcepack does nothing without it!)](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music)

All credit to Microsoft, Mojang, C418, Lena Raine, Kumi Tanioka, and Aaron Cherof for the creation of the music. Feel free to use this in your modpacks!

This should also make converting existing music replacement mods into Reactive Music's songpack format a lot easier. Literally just convert your songs from .ogg to .mp3 and throw them in!

You can also get this music pack, with a few semi-canon additions over at my [Extra Tracks: History Restored pack.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/extra-tracks-history-restored)

Note: v1 of this resourcepack uses the pre-1.20 naming convention to title the tracks (calm1, calm2, etc). I will likely upload a second version that uses the post-1.20 naming convention (using the actual names of the tracks).
